properties.displayName: Enforce Public Ingress security best practices
properties.description: This initiative enforces ingress security best practices for Application Gateway, Load Balancer, API Management, and Azure Front Door resources.

nonComplianceMessages.message: Public ingress resources must meet Azure Landing Zone security requirements for WAF posture, TLS, diagnostics, and private connectivity.
Azure Front Door must use Premium tier to support required managed WAF capabilities and private origin connectivity.
Enable Azure Front Door resource logs to support security monitoring, incident response, and auditability.
Azure Front Door Standard/Premium must enforce minimum TLS version 1.2 for all client-facing traffic.
Front Door Standard/Premium with WAF must have resource logs enabled for security visibility and threat investigations.
Front Door WAF must enable request body inspection to detect malicious payloads in POST/PUT requests.
Each Azure Front Door entry point must be protected by an attached Web Application Firewall policy.
Front Door WAF must enable Bot Protection managed rules to reduce automated abuse and malicious bot traffic.
Front Door WAF must include a rate-limit rule to reduce denial-of-service risk and abusive request patterns.
Front Door Premium origins backed by Azure Storage Blob should use private connectivity instead of public origin exposure.
Front Door Premium origins backed by Azure App Service should use private connectivity instead of public origin exposure.
Front Door WAF must run in the required operating mode defined by policy parameters.
Application Gateway must be deployed with Azure Web Application Firewall enabled.
Enable Application Gateway resource logs to support monitoring, detection, and incident investigations.
Application Gateway WAF must enable request body inspection to detect malicious request payloads.
Application Gateway diagnostics must be sent to the configured Log Analytics workspace.
Load Balancer diagnostics must be sent to the configured Log Analytics workspace.
API Management diagnostics must be sent to the configured Log Analytics workspace.
Application Gateway must have Web Application Firewall enabled to protect internet-facing applications.
Application Gateway WAF must enable Bot Protection managed rules to reduce automated abuse.
Application Gateway for Containers must have security policies configured on exposed ingress paths.
